name: Clicking "Search" in the footer bottom bar navigates to the Search page

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
When  I click the "Search" link in the footer bottom bar
Then  the page title should be "Search – Sauce Demo"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Clicking "Search" in the footer bottom bar navigates to the Search page

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Clicking "Search" in the footer bottom bar navigates to the Search page
